snippets.comment: By far my favorite professor, she's super caring and will do all means possible to get you to a good grade. I had her for Intro Statistics, i came in this class knowing nothing about math and passed with an A, she teaches super well and will answer questions at any time she is super compassionate!

Best Math teacher I have ever had! I took her Intro to Stats class and omg she was AMAZING so many opportunities to get EC and the way she runs quizzes u get two tries one on ur own and the second time as a group! She was so nice and kind, I have NEVER gotten a good grade in math my whole life and I

This professor was amazing! She was super sweet and actually cares about her students and their well being.
